sentences.text: Hans said, 'I will have a wonderful time in my garden,' and he started working right away.
But he never had time for his flowers because the Miller always asked him to do long tasks or help at the mill.
Hans felt very sad sometimes because he was worried his flowers would think he forgot them.
He comforted himself by thinking that the Miller was his best friend.
